question: What is the main purpose of the video?
options: To share essential information for a successful pilgrimage
To show the scenic views of the Kamino Frances
To explain the history of the Kamino Frances
To provide a detailed map of the trail
answer_en: To share essential information for a successful pilgrimage
answer_zh: 分享成功朝聖的必要資訊
answer_ja: Compartir información esencial para una peregrinación exitosa
answer_es: Compartir información esencial para una peregrinación exitosa

question: Where does the fastest and easiest route to the trailhead start?
answer_en: Madrid
answer_zh: 馬德里
answer_ja: Madrid
answer_es: Madrid

question: What is recommended to do upon arriving at Saint Jean-Pierre de Porte?
options: Arrive a day early to rest and prepare
answer_en: Arrive a day early to rest and prepare
answer_zh: 提前一天抵達以休息和準備
answer_ja: Llegar un día antes para descansar y prepararse
answer_es: Llegar un día antes para descansar y prepararse

question: What type of shoes are most effective on the Kamino Frances?
options: Trail runners or low hiking shoes
answer_en: Trail runners or low hiking shoes
answer_zh: 越野跑鞋或低筒登山鞋
answer_ja: Zapatillas de trail o zapatos bajos de senderismo
answer_es: Zapatillas de trail o zapatos bajos de senderismo

question: What is the recommended backpack size for the pilgrimage?
answer_en: 30 to 40 litres
answer_zh: 30到40公升
answer_ja: 30 a 40 litros
answer_es: 30 a 40 litros

question: What are the three stages of the Camino described in the video?
answer_en: Physical, mental, and spiritual
answer_zh: 身體、心理和靈性階段
answer_ja: Física, mental y espiritual
answer_es: Física, mental y espiritual

question: What happens at the Iron Cross on the Camino?
options: Pilgrims lay down a stone or token
answer_en: Pilgrims lay down a stone or token
answer_zh: 朝聖者放下石頭或紀念物
answer_ja: Los peregrinos depositan una piedra o un símbolo
answer_es: Los peregrinos depositan una piedra o un símbolo

question: What is the final phase of the Camino about?
answer_en: Becoming someone new
answer_zh: 成為一個全新的人
answer_ja: Convertirse en alguien nuevo
answer_es: Convertirse en alguien nuevo

question: What does the video suggest about the mental phase of the Camino?
options: You will see many new landscapes
answer_en: Monotony can test your resolve
answer_zh: 單調會考驗你的決心
answer_ja: La monotonía puede poner a prueba tu determinación
answer_es: La monotonía puede poner a prueba tu determinación

question: What is the advice about shoe size for the pilgrimage?
options: Get shoes half to one size bigger
answer_en: Get shoes half to one size bigger
answer_zh: 鞋子比平常大半號到一號
answer_ja: Comprar zapatos medio número o un número más grandes
answer_es: Comprar zapatos medio número o un número más grandes

question: How long does the high-speed AVA train trip from Madrid to Pompaona take?
options: About three to three and a half hours
answer_en: About three to three and a half hours
answer_zh: 約三到三個半小時
answer_ja: Unas tres a tres horas y media
answer_es: Unas tres a tres horas y media

question: What is the flat taxi rate from Madrid airport to the train station?
answer_en: 33 euros
answer_zh: 33歐元
answer_ja: 33 euros
answer_es: 33 euros

question: How often does the bus run from Pompaona to Saint Jean-Pierre de Porte?
options: Once or twice daily depending on the season
answer_en: Once or twice daily depending on the season
answer_zh: 依季節一天一到兩班
answer_ja: Una o dos veces al día según la temporada
answer_es: Una o dos veces al día según la temporada

question: What is the preferred alternative to the bus from Pompaona to Saint Jean-Pierre de Porte?
answer_en: Taxi or shared shuttle
answer_zh: 計程車或共乘接駁車
answer_ja: Taxi o lanzadera compartida
answer_es: Taxi o lanzadera compartida

question: What type of socks does the video recommend for walking or running?
options: Smart wool or designed for walking/running
answer_en: Smart wool or designed for walking/running
answer_zh: 智慧羊毛或專為走路/跑步設計的襪子
answer_ja: Smartwool o calcetines diseñados para caminar/correr
answer_es: Smartwool o calcetines diseñados para caminar/correr

question: What additional gear is recommended to keep dirt and rocks out of shoes?
answer_en: Gators
answer_zh: 護腿套
answer_ja: Polainas
answer_es: Polainas

question: What does the video say about rain gear?
options: Either rain suit or poncho is fine, just be comfortable
answer_en: Either rain suit or poncho is fine, just be comfortable
answer_zh: 雨衣或雨披皆可，重點是舒適
answer_ja: Tanto traje de lluvia como poncho están bien; lo importante es estar cómodo
answer_es: Tanto traje de lluvia como poncho están bien; lo importante es estar cómodo

question: Why is a sleeping quilt recommended over a sleeping bag in some seasons?
options: Many Alberges do not provide blankets
answer_en: Many Alberges do not provide blankets
answer_zh: 許多住宿處不提供毯子
answer_ja: Muchos albergues no proporcionan mantas
answer_es: Muchos albergues no proporcionan mantas

question: What physical symptoms appear in the first stage of the Camino?
options: Blisters and aching legs and back
answer_en: Blisters and aching legs and back
answer_zh: 水泡和腿部及背部疼痛
answer_ja: Ampollas y dolor en las piernas y la espalda
answer_es: Ampollas y dolor en las piernas y la espalda

question: What mental challenge is described in the second stage of the Camino?
answer_en: Monotony and craving for stimulation
answer_zh: 單調與渴望刺激
answer_ja: Monotonía y deseo de estímulo
answer_es: Monotonía y deseo de estímulo

question: What does 'pilgrimage' mean in the context of the video?
options: A long journey for a spiritual purpose
answer_en: A long journey for a spiritual purpose
answer_zh: 為靈性目的的長途旅程
answer_ja: Un viaje largo con un propósito espiritual
answer_es: Un viaje largo con un propósito espiritual

question: What does 'trailhead' refer to?
options: The starting point of a trail
The highest point of a mountain
answer_en: The starting point of a trail
answer_zh: 步道的起點
answer_ja: El punto de inicio de un sendero
answer_es: El punto de inicio de un sendero

question: What does 'escalator' mean?
answer_en: A moving staircase
answer_zh: 自動扶梯
answer_ja: Una escalera mecánica
answer_es: Una escalera mecánica

question: What does 'monotony' mean in the video?
answer_en: Lack of variety and boredom
answer_zh: 單調和無聊
answer_ja: Falta de variedad y aburrimiento
answer_es: Falta de variedad y aburrimiento

question: What does 'rebellion' mean in the phrase 'your body is staging a small rebellion'?
answer_en: Resistance or protest
answer_zh: 反抗或抗議
answer_ja: Resistencia o protesta
answer_es: Resistencia o protesta

question: What does 'vibrant sole' refer to in the context of shoes?
answer_en: A brightly colored shoe bottom
answer_zh: 鮮豔顏色的鞋底
answer_ja: Una suela de zapato de color llamativo
answer_es: Una suela de zapato de color llamativo

question: What does 'shoulder seasons' mean?
options: The periods between peak and off-peak seasons
answer_en: The periods between peak and off-peak seasons
answer_zh: 旺季與淡季之間的時期
answer_ja: Los períodos entre la temporada alta y la baja
answer_es: Los períodos entre la temporada alta y la baja

question: What does 'fit the size of your feet' mean regarding socks?
options: Socks should match your foot size
answer_en: Socks should match your foot size
answer_zh: 襪子應符合腳的尺寸
answer_ja: Los calcetines deben ajustarse al tamaño del pie
answer_es: Los calcetines deben ajustarse al tamaño del pie

question: What does 'shared shuttle' mean?
options: A transport service shared by multiple passengers
answer_en: A transport service shared by multiple passengers
answer_zh: 多位乘客共乘的交通服務
answer_ja: Un servicio de transporte compartido por varios pasajeros
answer_es: Un servicio de transporte compartido por varios pasajeros

question: What does 'packing list' refer to?
options: A list of items to bring on a trip
A list of places to visit
answer_en: A list of items to bring on a trip
answer_zh: 旅行要攜帶物品清單
answer_ja: Una lista de artículos para llevar en un viaje
answer_es: Una lista de artículos para llevar en un viaje

question: How would you describe the physical challenges of the first stage of the Camino to a friend?
options: Blisters, aching legs, and back pain test your endurance
It is an easy walk with no pain
You can rest often and avoid pain
answer_en: Blisters, aching legs, and back pain test your endurance
answer_zh: 水泡、腿痛和背痛考驗你的耐力
answer_ja: Las ampollas, el dolor de piernas y de espalda ponen a prueba tu resistencia
answer_es: Las ampollas, el dolor de piernas y de espalda ponen a prueba tu resistencia

question: What advice would you give about choosing shoes for the pilgrimage?
options: Choose trail runners with a vibrant sole and a size bigger
answer_en: Choose trail runners with a vibrant sole and a size bigger
answer_zh: 選擇有鮮豔鞋底且大半號的越野跑鞋
answer_ja: Elegir zapatillas de trail con buena suela y una talla más grande
answer_es: Elegir zapatillas de trail con buena suela y una talla más grande

question: How can you prepare mentally for the monotony in the second stage of the Camino?
options: Engage in conversations and embrace the quiet scenery
answer_en: Engage in conversations and embrace the quiet scenery
answer_zh: 多與人交談並接受寧靜的風景
answer_ja: Conversar y aceptar el paisaje tranquilo
answer_es: Conversar y aceptar el paisaje tranquilo

question: What does the final spiritual phase of the Camino symbolize for many pilgrims?
options: A personal rebirth and letting go of burdens
The end of the journey only
answer_en: A personal rebirth and letting go of burdens
answer_zh: 個人的重生與放下負擔
answer_ja: Un renacimiento personal y soltar cargas
answer_es: Un renacimiento personal y soltar cargas

question: If you were to explain the importance of packing light, what would you say?
options: Carrying only what you need reduces weight and fatigue
Bring as many items as possible
Packing heavy items is better for stability
answer_en: Carrying only what you need reduces weight and fatigue
answer_zh: 只帶必需品可減輕重量與疲勞
answer_ja: Llevar solo lo necesario reduce peso y fatiga
answer_es: Llevar solo lo necesario reduce peso y fatiga

question: How would you describe the feeling when arriving at Santiago after the pilgrimage?
options: A powerful mix of physical, mental, and spiritual achievement
Confusion about what to do next
answer_en: A powerful mix of physical, mental, and spiritual achievement
answer_zh: 身心靈成就感的強烈融合
answer_ja: Una poderosa mezcla de logro físico, mental y espiritual
answer_es: Una poderosa mezcla de logro físico, mental y espiritual

question: What would you say is the biggest challenge in the first stage of the Camino?
options: Physical pain and blisters testing your determination
answer_en: Physical pain and blisters testing your determination
answer_zh: 身體疼痛與水泡考驗決心
answer_ja: El dolor físico y las ampollas ponen a prueba tu determinación
answer_es: El dolor físico y las ampollas ponen a prueba tu determinación

question: How can sharing a taxi from the train station be beneficial?
options: It reduces cost and is more flexible
It is slower than the bus
It is more expensive and less comfortable
answer_en: It reduces cost and is more flexible
answer_zh: 降低費用且更有彈性
answer_ja: Reduce el costo y es más flexible
answer_es: Reduce el costo y es más flexible

question: Why is it important not to skimp on the price of shoes for the Camino?
options: Because shoes can make or break the walk
answer_en: Because shoes can make or break the walk
answer_zh: 鞋子決定行走的舒適與否
answer_ja: Porque los zapatos pueden hacer que la caminata sea un éxito o un fracaso
answer_es: Porque los zapatos pueden hacer que la caminata sea un éxito o un fracaso

question: 延伸口說 fallback
answer_en: A
answer_zh: A
answer_ja: A
answer_es: A
